channel.title: BATorrent Blog
channel.description: Release notes and build logs from BATorrent, the open-source BitTorrent client with a media-hub UI.

item.title: BATorrent 4.2 “Polish”
item.description: A Ctrl+K command palette, subtitles in the built-in player, torrents that explain why they're stuck, trash-safe deletes, and a hundred quieter details.
